title: Russell Hobbs Good-to-Go 6.5L Electric Multicooker - 8 Digital functions inc Sear, Slow Cook, Steam, Boil, Keep warm & Roast, Cast aluminium housing, Glass lid, Dishwasher safe parts, 750W, 28270
features: 8 Versatile Cooking Functions - Make tasty meals that make everyone feel at home. Choose from: Sear; Roast; Sous Vide; Slow Cook; Steam; Rice; Boil and Keep Warm.
6.5 Litre Capacity Pot - This large pot can cater for everyone and be taken straight to the table to let everyone tuck in.
Durable Cast Aluminium Housing - The cooking pot is designed to withstand wear and tear; as you take it from countertop to tabletop; to dishwasher and tested to 100 wash cycles.
Removable Control Panel - Go from countertop to tabletop. With a Removable Control Panel, you can easily take your piping hot meals straight to the table to serve.
2 Year Manufacturer's Guarantee - Plus 1 extra year when you register the product online.
description: From the manufacturer 8 Versatile Cooking Functions Make Every Dinner Easy! The Good to Go Multi-Cooker has 8 Versatile Cooking Functions ; to make tasty meals that make everyone feel at home. From roasting meat or slow cooking casseroles to making flavoursome risottos; you can cook all kinds of tasty meals effortlessly in one pot. Choose from: Sear, Roast, Sous Vide, Slow Cook, Steam, Rice, Boil and Keep Warm. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Next page Easy to Cook, Serve & Clean! 1 Cook 2 Remove Panel 3 Serve 4 Clean Energy saving Save energy whilst you cook your meals with the Good to Go Multi-cooker that is designed to save energy whilst you cook.
